name: jat13-app
description: JAT 13 desktop app — the brain. Electron main (single DB writer, Hono loopback server on 7860/7861, tray-resident) + preload + Atelier Noir renderer. Stage 0: skeleton + dev-drive harness.
comment:stage0: Stage-0 dep set. Deliberately dropped until their stage lands (scar: dormant half-mechanisms — v13-postmortem §2#10): croner (Stage 3 scheduler/discovery ticks), @googleapis/gmail + google-auth-library + imapflow + mailparser (Stage 5 Gmail), mammoth + unpdf (document text extraction, returns with the docs pipeline). electron-updater stays now because the release chain (version-less JAT-13-Setup.exe + latest.yml on PierreSalama/jat13-app) is part of the locked identity; runtime wiring arrives Stage 6.
comment:ai: AI layer (Stage 4) = local CLI subscriptions (Claude Code + Codex) via child_process. NO Anthropic/OpenAI SDK dependency, ever — subscriptions cannot back third-party apps server-side.
comment:build: No scripts here by design: the monorepo root owns typecheck (tsc) and emit (esbuild) for main/preload/renderer; electron-builder consumes dist/. Root devDeps provide @types/node, esbuild, vitest.
